description: M3: Workspace page with two-panel layout, chat messages, reactions, inline title edit, agent mode dropdown, @mentions.

userStories.title: Chat Messages API
userStories.description: Backend endpoints for sending and listing chat messages
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ideas/:id/chat creates chat_message (sender_type=user, sender_id=current_user), returns 201 {id, idea_id, sender_type, sender_id, content, created_at}
GET /api/ideas/:id/chat lists messages ordered by created_at ASC with pagination (?limit, ?offset), returns 200 {messages, total, limit, offset}
Validates: content not empty, user has access to idea
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: services/gateway/apps/chat/views.py, serializers.py, urls.py
Gotchas: Mirror model pattern (managed=False, db_table=chat_messages). Immutable model (append-only).

data_model: chat_messages: id uuid PK, idea_id uuid FK, sender_type IN(user,ai), sender_id uuid FK (NULL for AI), content text, created_at timestamptz

userStories.title: User Reactions API
userStories.description: Endpoints for adding/removing reactions to user messages
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/ideas/:id/chat/:msgId/reactions creates user_reaction, returns 201

Validates: reaction_type IN(thumbs_up,thumbs_down,heart), target is user message, not AI message (400 CANNOT_REACT_TO_AI), not own message (400 CANNOT_REACT_TO_SELF), not duplicate (409 ALREADY_REACTED)
DELETE /api/ideas/:id/chat/:msgId/reactions removes reaction, returns 204
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: services/gateway/apps/chat/views.py (AddReactionView, RemoveReactionView), serializers.py
Gotchas: Query chat_messages to validate sender_type and sender_id. UNIQUE(message_id, user_id).

data_model: user_reactions: id uuid PK, message_id uuid FK, user_id uuid FK, reaction_type IN(thumbs_up,thumbs_down,heart), UNIQUE(message_id,user_id)

userStories.title: Workspace Page Route
userStories.description: Page component at /idea/:uuid that fetches and displays idea data
acceptanceCriteria: Route /idea/:uuid renders IdeaWorkspacePage component
Fetches GET /api/ideas/:id on mount (uuid from useParams), displays loading skeleton, error state on 404/403
Updates document.title with idea.title
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/pages/idea-workspace.tsx, frontend/src/app/router.tsx, frontend/src/api/ideas.ts
Gotchas: useParams() to extract uuid. useEffect to fetch. The GET /api/ideas/:id endpoint already exists from M2.
QA DEF-002: useCallback at IdeaWorkspace/index.tsx:109 called conditionally after early returns — violates rules-of-hooks. Move it before the if(loading) check.
QA DEF-001: Missing frontend tests T-1.7.01, T-1.7.02.

data_model: ideas: id uuid, title varchar, state IN(open,in_review,accepted,dropped,rejected), agent_mode IN(interactive,silent)
api_endpoints: GET /api/ideas/:id → 200 {id, title, state, agent_mode, collaborators: [{user_id, display_name}]}

userStories.title: Two-Panel Layout with Draggable Divider
userStories.description: Chat (left) and board/review tabs (right) with resizable divider
acceptanceCriteria: Two panels: chat (left), tabbed context panel (right) with Board/Review tabs. Board tab default active
Vertical divider (4px visual, 12px hit), draggable, gold on hover/drag, double-click resets to 40/60
Min widths: 280px chat, 320px board. localStorage persistence (key: workspace-panel-split)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/workspace/WorkspaceLayout.tsx, PanelDivider.tsx
Gotchas: Mouse events (onMouseDown, onMouseMove, onMouseUp) with document listeners. Store % ratio in localStorage, not pixels.
QA DEF-001: Missing frontend tests T-1.1.01, T-1.1.02, T-1.1.03.

components: PanelDivider: vertical draggable, 4px/12px, gold hover, double-click reset, localStorage

userStories.title: Workspace Header
userStories.description: Back button, inline title edit, agent mode dropdown, presence placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: Header layout: back button (left), editable title (center-left), agent mode dropdown (center-right), presence placeholder (right)
Title: click to edit, Enter saves (PATCH /api/ideas/:id {title}), Escape cancels, sets title_manually_edited=true
Agent mode dropdown: Interactive/Silent options, sends PATCH /api/ideas/:id {agent_mode}
Optimistic updates for title and agent_mode
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/workspace/WorkspaceHeader.tsx, frontend/src/api/ideas.ts
Gotchas: contentEditable or controlled input. Backend must set title_manually_edited=true when title field present. Use shadcn Select.
QA DEF-001: Missing frontend tests T-1.6.01, T-1.6.02, T-1.6.03, T-2.1.01, T-2.1.02.

data_model: ideas: title varchar, title_manually_edited boolean, agent_mode IN(interactive,silent)

userStories.title: Section Visibility + Locking
acceptanceCriteria: Open (never submitted): review hidden, chat enabled. Open (submitted): review visible, chat enabled
In Review: review active, chat locked (LockOverlay). Rejected: review visible, chat enabled. Accepted/Dropped: all read-only
LockOverlay wraps entire chat panel with bg-card/80, lock icon, explanation text
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/workspace/SectionLockManager.tsx, LockOverlay.tsx, ChatPanel.tsx, pages/idea-workspace.tsx
Gotchas: has_been_submitted heuristic: idea.state !== 'open' (M3 simple approach). Refine in future milestones.
QA DEF-001: Missing frontend tests T-1.2.01, T-1.2.02, T-1.2.03, T-1.4.01, T-1.4.02, T-1.4.03, T-1.4.04, T-1.4.05.

userStories.title: Chat Message Display
acceptanceCriteria: Lists messages from GET /api/ideas/:id/chat. User: right-aligned, bg-secondary, rounded-tr-sm. AI: left-aligned, bg-card+border, rounded-tl-sm, Bot icon
Delegation messages: opacity-60, italic. Sender name below user bubbles (multi-user mode). Auto-scroll on load and new messages
Empty state: 'Start brainstorming...' + Lightbulb icon
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/chat/ChatMessageList.tsx, UserMessageBubble.tsx, AIMessageBubble.tsx, DelegationMessage.tsx
Gotchas: useEffect scrollIntoView on messages change. Multi-user: idea.collaborators.length > 0. lucide-react Bot icon.

data_model: chat_messages: sender_type IN(user,ai), sender_id uuid (NULL for AI), content text, message_type IN(regular,delegation)
components: AIMessageBubble: left, bg-card+border, rounded-tl-sm, Bot icon

userStories.title: ChatInput with Send Button
userStories.description: Auto-grow textarea, send button, Enter to send
acceptanceCriteria: Layout: context indicator (20px circle placeholder), textarea (flex-1, auto-grow), send button (disabled if empty)
Enter sends (without Shift), Shift+Enter newline. POST /api/ideas/:id/chat {content}, clears after 201
Loading state: disabled + spinner
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/chat/ChatInput.tsx, frontend/src/components/workspace/ChatPanel.tsx
Gotchas: Auto-grow: rows=1, scrollHeight calc, update height. onKeyDown detect Enter/Shift. trim() check for empty.

userStories.title: @Mention Dropdown
acceptanceCriteria: @ opens dropdown above input. First item: @ai (Bot icon). Remaining: collaborators (alphabetical)
Filter on typing after @. Arrow keys + Enter navigate/select. Inserts @username at cursor
Closes on Escape, click outside, or @ removal
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/chat/MentionDropdown.tsx, ChatInput.tsx
Gotchas: selectionStart for @ position. Filter display_name (case-insensitive). setSelectionRange after insert. M3 uses plain @username (M7 adds backend parsing).
QA DEF-001: Missing frontend tests T-2.9.01, T-2.9.02, T-2.9.03.

components: MentionDropdown: @ trigger, users+@ai, keyboard nav, filter

userStories.title: User Reactions UI
userStories.description: Reaction chips below messages, toggle add/remove
acceptanceCriteria: User messages (not AI, not own) show reaction chip row: thumbs_up, thumbs_down, heart (emoji + count if >0)
Click toggles: POST .../reactions or DELETE. Active state highlighted. Optimistic updates
Error toast on validation failure (400/409)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes:
Files: frontend/src/components/chat/ReactionChips.tsx, UserMessageBubble.tsx, frontend/src/api/reactions.ts
Gotchas: Map emoji to reaction_type string. Optimistic: add/remove locally, rollback on error. Show toast for 400/409.

data_model: user_reactions: message_id uuid FK, user_id uuid FK, reaction_type IN(thumbs_up,thumbs_down,heart)
components: ReactionChips: 3 emojis, toggle, count, active highlight, bg-muted rounded-full
test_cases: T-2.8.01–05: add, AI check, self check, duplicate check, remove
